Jiangsu Huatong Electric Technology Co. presents a distinct profile of a micro-scale trading or bidding entity operating within the electrical equipment sector. However, forensic analysis of its 2024 workforce data reveals only 4 insured employees. This profound divergence between massive capital and a 4-person team strongly contradicts its 'Manufacturing' registration. Instead, it indicates an asset-light operational model focused on electrical equipment sales, cable tray distribution, and likely public/commercial project bidding. The 7.5 million RMB paid-in capital serves as a critical qualification threshold for participating in regional procurement tenders, while the actual physical manufacturing is almost certainly outsourced. The use of personal telecom emails (139.com, linked to the legal rep's phone) further confirms a highly centralized, small-scale owner-operator dynamic.
